# Project structure (always-on)

- Base package: `{{BASE_PACKAGE}}`. New code goes under the matching layer package — do not create a
  parallel structure. See `architecture.md` for the full map.
- Layers and their direction: `{{LAYER_CONVENTION}}`. Dependencies point inward; the domain depends on nothing.
- Put a new type where its peers already live; match existing package naming.
- Cross-cutting concerns (filters, advice, config) live in their established packages, not beside features.
